parameters.query: =SELECT id FROM routes WHERE route_number = {{ $json.route_number }} AND zip_code = '{{ $json.zip_code }}' LIMIT 1

meta.description: Scrapes Google Maps for businesses within a specific postal route (zip code) and assigns them to that route in Supabase.
meta.usage: POST to webhook with body: { city: 'Fayetteville', state: 'NC', route_number: 1, zip_code: '28301', categories: 'tattoo shop,barbershop,gym' }
requirements: Google Maps API key (set as env var GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in n8n)
Routes must exist in database before scraping
